channel.title: Home on gjx00 Blogfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Home on gjx00 Blogfolio

item.title: Portfolio
item.description:
Gabriel Justo Ordoñez

Backend Developer & Cybersecurity enthusiast

Backend developer focused on microservices and distributed systems.
Passionate about technology, infrastructure, and cybersecurity.
Always learning and exploring areas beyond web development.

Experience

Backend Developer — Cleverpy Machine Learning
Oct 2021 – Present

Tech

Java • Spring • PostgreSQL • PostGIS • Docker • Linux • Jenkins • ELK
Python • Go • C

Projects

  • Custom programming language interpreter (Go)
  • Enterprise homelab simulation (Proxmox, VLANs, Wazuh, pfSense, Docker)
  • Security tools in C (network mapper, Toralizer)
  • Marketplace scraper with Telegram integration (Python/Go)

More: https://github.com/gjustoo

item.title: My First Post
item.description:
Hello world

Hello Everynyan, this is my first post, and also a test post.

WTH am I doing ?

Idk, just writing stuff on the internet and practicing my english wiritting skills… They’re so rusty…

ANyaway here’s an image of literally me

item.title: My First Post
item.description:

WTH am I doing ?

item.title: Markdown Syntax Guide
item.description:
For a quick cheatsheet, check out https://simplemde.com/markdown-guide.

This article offers a sample of basic Markdown syntax that can be used in Hugo content files, also it shows whether basic HTML elements are decorated with CSS in a Hugo theme.
